subparts.text: Explain the main components of the Global Positioning System and its benefits.
What is geo-referencing in GIS, and why is it important?
Differentiate between raster data capture and spatial data generalization in GIS.
Briefly describe how GIS supports decision-making through buffer and overlay analysis.
Discuss the process of spatial data entry into GIS and explain how attribute data is linked to spatial data.
Explain the concepts of coordinate systems and geo-coding in GIS. How do they contribute to accurate mapping and spatial analysis?
Describe the various GIS data processing techniques, including digitization, topology building, and metadata creation, highlighting their significance in GIS applications.
What are the different scales and levels of information needs in planning information systems?
Explain the process of terrain modelling and its applications in information systems.
Describe the role of summary statistics and inference in data analysis within information systems.
